de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction

Interface ArrayType

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement, Type
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ArrayDeclaration

    public interface ArrayType
extends Type
    A program model element representing array types.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getAlternativeNameRepresentation()
      full name of the array in alternative form, i.e.
      TypeReference getBaseType()
      returns the type reference to the arrays base type
      int getDimension()
      returns the dimension of the array
      String getFullName()
      full name of the array type

    • Method Detail

      • getBaseType

        returns the type reference to the arrays base type

      • getDimension

        int getDimension()
        returns the dimension of the array
        Returns:
        an int containing the array's dimension

      • getName

        String getName()
        name of the array type

        getName in interface NamedModelElement

      • getFullName

        String getFullName()
        full name of the array type
        Specified by:
        getFullName in interface ProgramModelElement
        Returns:
        the full name of this program model element.

      • getAlternativeNameRepresentation

        String getAlternativeNameRepresentation()
        full name of the array in alternative form, i.e. e.g. int[] instead of [I
